message:
fix(gateway): TypeScript errors in auth middleware

- Use bracket notation for index signature access (TS4111)
- Use explicit array indexing with non-null assertions (TS2769)
- Convert Buffer to Uint8Array for WebCrypto compatibility (TS2345)
- Build AuthContext properly for exactOptionalPropertyTypes (TS2375)
- Export getBearerToken and verifyJwtHs256 for use in WebSocket auth
- Add JWT verification for WebSocket upgrade requests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
